content.value: SA ENVIRO SOLUTIONS (SAES), provides quality and customized services to address Environmental Aspects, specifically in Water and WastewaterTreatment, Zero Liquid Discharge, Air Pollution Control, Energy, Safety & Solid-Waste Management.

The company focused on its core competencies and providing valve-based services. It is perceived in the market as a company who is committed to quality and delivery. We stand tall because of our philosophy of core valve that can only be matched with our commitment.

SAES is managed by Mrs. Amruta Urdukhe & Mr. Santosh Urdukhe, Masters in Environmental Sciences, experienced in designing and developing water treatment machines and plants. The company has a team of qualified technical professionals in areas of Environment Science, Microbiology, Electrical, Mechanical, Instrumentation and Civil Engineering to offer efficient technology for treating water. SAES workshop is located at Chinchwad, Pune for fabrication of treatment machines.

content.value: SA Enviro Solutions (SAES), provides quality and customized services to address Environmental Aspects, specifically in Water Treatment, Zero Liquid Discharge, Air Pollution Control, Energy, Safety & Waste Management.
The Chemical dosing system is designed for adding of chemicals into water to separate solids by conditioning.

The Clarifiers are settling tanks used to separate solid particulates from liquids.
SA Enviro Solutions provide variety of Clarifiers to suit various solid separation methods in settling of solids.
The biologically accomplishment of waste water is done by using a variety of microorganisms.
The Tube settlers are designed to enter flocculated water through multiple tube deck from the bottom and flow upward in angle of 60°.
These Filters are custom designed to suit the process requirement. The backwash is taken after every interval to maintain the efficiency of filter and filtrate water quality.
The Activated Carbon Filters consist of Activated carbon granules supported by very fine quartz filter media. The various grades of carbon are available for specialized treatments.

metadata.alt: Pressure Sand Filter & activated carbon filter

content.value: We at SA Enviro Solutions manufacture and supply effluent treatment Plants. The effluent treatment plants are designed to treat the effluent coming from different process of the plant. The treatment of different effluents varies with the type of effluent. The industrial effluent treatment plants involve different stages of treatment including physio- chemical treatment and biological treatment followed by tertiary treatment. Integrated functions with simple control make the operation much easier. Our engineers can also custom design the effluent treatment plants based on the specific application requirement of the customers. Our Industrial effluent treatment plants have a compact design and can be easily installed on the site.

We at SA Enviro Solutions manufacture and supply effluent treatment Plants. The effluent treatment plants are designed to treat the effluent coming from different process of the plant. The treatment of different effluents varies with the type of effluent. The industrial effluent treatment plants involve different stages of treatment including physio- chemical treatment and biological treatment followed by tertiary treatment. Integrated functions with simple control make the operation much easier. Our engineers can also custom design the effluent treatment plants based on the specific application requirement of the customers. Our Industrial effluent treatment plants have a compact design and can be easily installed on the site.

content.value: The Chemical dosing system is designed for adding of chemicals into water to separate solids by conditioning.

The Clarifiers are settling tanks used to separate solid particulates from liquids.
SA Enviro Solutions provide variety of Clarifiers to suit various solid separation methods in settling of solids.
The biologically accomplishment of waste water is done by using a variety of microorganisms.
The Tube settlers are designed to enter flocculated water through multiple tube deck from the bottom and flow upward in angle of 60°.
These Filters are custom designed to suit the process requirement. The backwash is taken after every interval to maintain the efficiency of filter and filtrate water quality.
The Activated Carbon Filters consist of Activated carbon granules supported by very fine quartz filter media. The various grades of carbon are available for specialized treatments.
The Dual Media Filter are utilized for higher flow rates with a smaller footprint. High filtration velocities are achieved by proper selection of Media, and designing of Distribution.
RO is a water purification process that uses a partially permeable membrane to separate ions, unwanted molecules and larger particles from drinking water.
SA Enviro Solutions supply a wide range of Water Treatment Plants, Packaged Water Treatment Plants.
We offer a huge range of Sewage Treatment Plants, which are used in the national as well as international market.
We at SA Enviro Solutions manufacture and supply effluent treatment Plants. The effluent treatment plants are designed to treat the effluent coming from different process of the plant.
It is the process of removing mineral salts from water by using the ion exchange process. Demineralization produces water of a higher quality than conventional distillation.
The Water Softeners are available in different sizes and materials, manually operated or fully Automatic and ready to install.
We at SA Enviro Solutions manufacture and supply effluent treatment Plants. The effluent treatment plants are designed to treat the effluent coming from different process of the plant.

We offer a large variety of Pool Filtration Systems, Dosing Systems & Accessories.
As for water circulation and surface cleaning, our technologies have been widely tested in the market; the skimmer and level deck techniques ensure perfect water quality at all times.

content.value: The Tube settlers are designed to enter flocculated water through multiple tube deck from the bottom and flow upward in angle of 60°.
These Filters are custom designed to suit the process requirement. The backwash is taken after every interval to maintain the efficiency of filter and filtrate water quality.
The Activated Carbon Filters consist of Activated carbon granules supported by very fine quartz filter media. The various grades of carbon are available for specialized treatments.
